candidate_problems.text: Specify criticism sets for legal, historical, and metaphysical identity judgments and test whether historical-causal continuity plus reference-stabilizing practice consistently outperforms matter- or structure-based criteria across puzzle cases.
Determine whether any non-contextual identity criterion can survive variation tests across repaired originals, exact replicas, teletransportation, and organism turnover cases.
Clarify whether framework-relativity here reflects genuine pluralism about identity or merely ambiguity in the word 'same'.
